title: parkia ulei var. ulei
intro: Parkia ulei var. ulei is a variant of the Parkia ulei plant, a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the bark and leaves of Parkia ulei var. ulei have been used in folk medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as antibacterial and anti-inflammatory actions. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
